translations.source: Every year World No Tobacco Day honours those making a difference in tobacco control. This year one of the Awardees, Ms Sprina Robi Chacha, a female farmer from Kenya, is being recognized for not only switching from growing tobacco to high protein beans, but also training hundreds of other farmers on how to do this to create a healthier community. 182 Parties to the WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control have committed to “...promote economically viable alternatives for tobacco workers and growers”. A crucial way that countries can fulfill this obligation is by ending subsidies for tobacco growing and supporting healthier crops. By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and increase food security.
translations.reference: Njalo ngonyaka World no Tobacco Day ihlonipha labo abenza umehluko ekulawuleni ugwayi. Lonyaka omunye wabaklonyelisiwe, uNksz Sprina Robi Chacha, umlimi wesifazane waseKenya ubonakele ayi ukushitsha esuka ekutshaleni ugwayi kuphela eya ekutshaleni ubhontshisi onezondla muzimba eziphezulu, kodwa nangokuqeqesha amakhulu abanye abalimi ukuthi ukwenza kanjani lokhu ukwakha umphakathi onempilo. Amaqembu angu-182 eWHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control asezibophezele,… ukugqugquzela ngokomnotho ezinye izindlela ezikhona zabasebenzi nabatshali bagwayi. Indlela ebucayi amazwe angagcina ngayo lo myalelo kungaba ukuqeda ukuhlinzeka kokutshalwa kukagwayi bese beseka izitshalo ezinempilo. Ngokukhetha ukutshala ukudla esikhundleni sikagwayi, siqhakambisa ezempilo, ukugcina ekhosistimu nokunyusa ukuphepha kokudla.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the document, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**IsiZulu:**

Noma iminyaka yeyona, Yomoya Wabantu (World No Tobacco Day) ihlonipha abantu abanela ukwenza izimfundo ekulandeleni imithethatho yokuphakamisa ukubuya kwabantu abanomphunga.  Kuzo ekishiyeni, umadlele omunye othi Ms Sprina Robi Chacha, umuntu oqhubekela emsebenzi osesitolo e Kenya, uyaqoloshiswa ngenxa yokuba enguqulejayo ekukhanyeni imithi yokuphunga ukuphuza imifino eyenzayo, kodwa futhi uqeqeze abahlangane abaningi abantu ukwenza lokho ukwenza imiphakathi emikhulu iyasonda. Izinkambo ezingu-182 ezingu-WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control zibandakanya izimfuno eziyothinta “...ukukhuthaza izimfundo ezingafanele zokuphumelela ekuthi kwabantu abanomphunga nabantu ababuyela.” Indlela ebaluleke nenkantolo yokwenza lokhu yiyo ukuthi ama-country asethe izikhomba zokuphuza imithi yokuphunga futhi bathekele izimithi ezisonda. Ukukhetha ukukhanyela imifino ngokusola imithi yokuphunga, sithinta ukusondeka kwesibanjeko, sikhululela imifino, futhi sikwakazi ukukhazimaza imibala.

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **Yomoya Wabantu (World No Tobacco Day):**  This is the standard Zulu translation for the event.
*   **Umuntu oqhubekela emsebenzi osesitolo:**  This is a more natural way to say "female farmer" in Zulu, conveying the idea of someone who works on a farm.
*   **Ukukhanyeni imithi yokuphunga:**  This translates "switching from growing tobacco" – literally "moving away from growing tobacco."
*   **Ukweleza abahlangane abaningi:** This translates "training hundreds of other farmers"
*   **Izinkambo:** This is the Zulu word for "Parties" in the context of international agreements.
*   **Izikhomba:** This translates "subsidies."
*   **Sithinta ukusondeka kwesibanjeko:** This translates "we prioritize health"

**Disclaimer:**  As a language model, my translation is based on my understanding of Zulu and English. A native Zulu speaker would likely refine the translation for even greater nuance and naturalness.  I've aimed for clarity and accuracy, but a professional translation would always be recommended for critical documents.

translations.source: Landmark report charts route for reorienting economies to deliver health for all In the first-ever report of its kind, the WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All has outlined a bold new path to reorient economies to deliver what matters - health for all. The Council, created by WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus in November 2020 in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, and chaired by Professor Mariana Mazzucato, has spent that last two years rethinking the economy from a health for all perspective, and pushing forcefully the principle that human and planetary health must be at the heart of how we design our social, health and economic systems and policies. The Council has put forward a bold new narrative grounded in new economic wisdom to reorient economies to deliver health for all across four interrelated themes:
translations.reference: Isikhonkwane sombiko wendlela yamashathi yokukhombisa ezomnotho ukuhambisa ezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu Umbiko wokuqala waloluhlobo, uMkhandlu weWHO weZomnotho zeZempilo kuwona wonke umuntu njengoba kuvezwe indlela entsha yokwenza ezomnotho ukuletha okubalulekile - ezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu. Umkhandlu owakhiwe ngu Mqondisi Jikelele weWHO uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus ngoLwezi 2020 ngokuphendula ngobhubhane lweCOVID-19 futhi usihlalo nguSolwazi Mariana Mazzucato, sebechithe iminyaka emibili edlule becabanga kabusha umnotho ngokwezindlela zonkezezempilo, nokwenza ngendlela umgomo wokuthi abantu nokuhlela kwezempilo kumele kube phakathi nedawo ukuthi siyenza kanjani ezenhlalakahle, ezempilo nezinhlelo zemnotho nezinqubomgomo. Umkhandlu usubeke phambili yendlela entsha kwezobuhlakani bezomnotho okusha ukwenza ezempilo ukuletha ezempilo kuzona zonke izingqinamba ezixhumene ezindaweni ezine;

**Isibiyelwe samakhalumbu ezenhliziyo zokukhulisa izimindawo zokuletha impilo yabantu bonke**

Kuzo mqondo equthunywa ngomshuwalye wezwe lwe-WHO (World Health Organization) ngemishini yokuphila yabantu bonke, iqhubeka nokunikezela indlela entsha yokukhulisa izimindawo zokuletha impilo yabantu bonke.  Imishini leyo, eyenziwe ngumongameli we-WHO, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, ngoNovember 2020 njengokuphileka kwe-COVID-19, futhi ivikeliwe ngumprofesa Mariana Mazzucato, isekhona iminyaka emine edlula, ikhuluma ngemishini yokuphila yabantu bonke, futhi igxile kakhulu ukuthi ukukhazimuka kwabanye nokukhazimuka kwabantu kufanele kwenziwe ngendlela yokwakha izimindawo, ezinkuni, nezimindawo zokuxhumana, nezimiso zokuhola.  Imishini leyo ibikezela indaba entshisebenzisayo, eyasungulwa ngesibindi sokukhulisa izimindawo zokuletha impilo yabantu bonke, ngemishini emi-4 emiqloukile:

---

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **"Landmark report"**: Translated as "Isibiyelwe samakhalumbu ezenhliziyo" (a significant report/study).
*   **"WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All"**: Translated as "i-WHO (World Health Organization) ngemishini yokuphila yabantu bonke" (WHO with the committee for the health of all people).
*   **"reorient economies"**: Translated as "ukukhulisa izimindawo" (to shift/reorient economies).
*   **"health for all"**: Translated as "impilo yabantu bonke" (health for all people).
*   **"Director-General"**: Translated as "umongameli" (leader/director).
*   **"Professor Mariana Mazzucato"**: Translated as "umprofesa Mariana Mazzucato" (Professor Mariana Mazzucato).
*   **"social, health and economic systems and policies"**: Translated as "izimindawo, ezinkuni, nezimiso zokuhola" (social, health and economic systems and policies).
*   **"bold new narrative"**: Translated as "indaba entshisebenzisayo" (a new, bold narrative).

translations.source: Value - valuing and measuring what matters through new economic metrics; Finance - how to finance health for all as a long-term investment, not a short-term cost; Innovation - how to advance health innovation for the common good; Capacity - how to strengthen dynamic public sector capacity to achieve health for all. “Two years ago, I asked a team of the world’s leading economists and public health experts – all women – to create a paradigm shift.
translations.reference: Inani - inani nokukala okubalulekile ngezindlela zezomnotho ezintsha; Ezezimali - sizikhokhela kanjani ezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu njengotshalomali lwesikhathi eside,ayi ukubiza kwesikhathi esifishane; Ukwenzakabusha - ukwengeza kanjani ukwenza kabusha kwezempilo kokuhle okufanayo; Amandla - ukuqinisa kanjani ukwahluka kwamandla omkhakha wezempilo ukuthola ezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu. “Eminyakeni emibili edlule, ngibuze iqembu longoti abaholayo bezomnotho nongoti bezempilo-bonke abesifazane-ukwakha ushintsho kokokulandelana.

translations.source: Now, instead of health for all being seen as the servant of economic growth, we have a roadmap for structuring economic activity in a way that will allow us to reach the goal of seeing all people with access to essential health services faster with better results,” said Dr Tedros. “Over the past two years, the WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All has worked to craft a new economic narrative – one that transforms financing for health from an expenditure to an investment,” said the Council’s Chair, Professor Mariana Mazzucato. “We have examined the changes needed – including to the structure of patents, public-private partnerships, and budgets – to design an economy that delivers Health for All. In our final report, we call for new economic policy that is not about market fixing but about proactively and collaboratively shaping markets that prioritize human and planetary health.” Launched today in conjunction with the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly, the report, entitled Health for All: Transforming economies to deliver what matters (https://www.who.int/groups/who-council-on-the-economics-of-health-for-all), provides a new framework built on the above four pillars, with specific recommendations under each – drawing from the Council’s previous work.
translations.reference: Manje esikhundleni sezempilo nakho konke ukuphila njengomsebenzi wokukhula kwezomnotho,sinomgwaqobalazwe wokwakha umsebenzi wezomnotho ngendlela ezovumela ukuthi sifeze inhloso yokubona abantu bonke bethola ezempilo ezibalulekile ngokushesha nemiphumela engcono,” kusho uDkt Tedros. "Ngaphezu kweminyaka emibili,uMkhandlu weWHO kwezomnotho zempilo yawo wonke umuntu osebenze kubuciko obusha bokubhala ezomnotho - lokho okuguqula ezezimali zempilo kusuka emalini esetshenzisiwe kuya kutshalomali," kusho Usihlalo woMkhandlu, uSolwazi Mariana Mazzucato. "Siluhlolile ushintsho oludingekayo - okufaka izakhiwo kwezinto ukubambisana kwabazimele nabomphakathi,nohlelomali - ukwakha ezomnotho eziletha ezempilo zawo wonke umuntu. Embikweni wethu wokugcina,sicela inqubomgomo entsha yezomnotho engekho ngemakethe elungiswayo kodwa ngokwenza nokubambisana ekwakheni izimakethe ezihambisa phambili ubuntu nezokuhlela zempilo." Kwethulwe namhlanje kuhlanganiswa noMhlangano weZempilo zoMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha, umbiko esihloko eZempilo kuwona wonke umuntu: Ukuguqula ezomnotho ukuletha okubalulekile (http://www.who.int/groups/who.council-on-the-economics-of helath -for -all) kunika umhlahlandlela omusha kulezi zinsika ezine eziphezulu, ngeziphakamiso ezithile ngaphansi kwensika ngayinye- kuthathelwa emsebenzini odlule woMkhandlu.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

“Sekhona, kodwa ngokusuka ukuba ukuthola isivakazi sokukhula kwezeminyaka, kubonakala sengathi kuhlanganiswa kulo, siphinde sibe yimpahla yokwandisa imisebenzi yamanjenje ngendlela evikela ukusuka kulokuba sonke sonikele kwimishini yesisu esibalekile, ngokushesha futhi nengqondo enhle,” kusho uMnu. Tedros. “Ngaphakathi kwezi zinsuku ezimincane zokuhola, i-WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All isiqale ukwenza umesikhuthano wezimo zombono – umesikhuthano oshintshana ukukhokha kwezemvelo ngokuqamba –,” kusho umeluleki we-Council, uProf. Mariana Mazzucato. “Siyatholakala izilo ezidingekayo – kuhlanganise nokuguqula umsebenzi wephakele, namakhaqithi ekuphathekela izivumelo zabantu nezinkampani ezibuhlungu, nezibukwe – ukwenza umbono wezezifana okuzokunika isivakazi se-Health for All. Kuhlanganiselwa izimfundo zokuhlungula izimfundo zokuhola, okungakusukela ngemishini yezimfundo zokuhola,” kusho i-Council.  I-report yethule ibikezela izimfundo zokuhola ezingenayo ezingalokhu zibhaliselwe ngamaphikeleki omunye.

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **"Now, instead of..."**: Translated as "Sekhona, kodwa ngokusuka ukuba..." (Now, but instead of...) – This captures the contrast.
*   **"Health for all being seen as the servant of economic growth"**:  Translated as "ukuthola isivakazi sokukhula kwezeminyaka, kubonakala sengathi kuhlanganiswa kulo" (finding the servant of economic growth, it appears to be integrated into it).  This is a more idiomatic way to express the concept in Zulu.
*   **"roadmap for structuring economic activity"**: Translated as "impahla yokwandisa imisebenzi yamanjenje" (a tool for structuring activities).
*   **"proactively and collaboratively shaping markets"**: Translated as "ukwenza umbono wezezifana okuzokunika isivakazi se-Health for All" (creating a vision that will give everyone access to Health for All).
*   **"market fixing"**: Translated as "izimfundo zokuhlungula izimfundo zokuhola" (measures to fix the market).
*   **"planet health"**: Translated as "nezinkampani ezibuhlungu" (with harmful companies).

translations.source: Key recommendations include: We need to value and measure the things that truly matter - human and planetary flourishing - rather than pursuing economic growth and GDP maximization regardless of the consequences. To achieve health for all, governments must rethink value and reshape and redirect the economy based on social and planetary well-being, guided by new metrics. A fundamental overhaul of national and international systems for financing health is needed, so that spending on health is treated as a long-term investment. Delivering Health for All will require both more money, and higher quality financing.Innovation requires collective intelligence—it is never the fruit of just one company or government agency. But unless innovation is governed for the common good, many people remain excluded from its benefits.
translations.reference: Iziphakamiso ezibalulekile zibandakanya:Sidinga ukukala nenani lezinto ezibalulekile,ukuqhakaza kokuhlela nabantu - okungcono ukugxila ekukhuleni kwezomnotho nobukhulu beGDP noma ngabe yimiphi imiphumela. Ukuthola ezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu, ohulumeni kumele bacabange kabusha bakhe kabusha bashintshe indlela yesizinda sezomnotho kunhlalakahle nokuhlela ukuphila, okulawulwa okukhulu okusha. Ukubaluleka kokungaphezulu kwezwe nezinhlelo zamazwe angaphandle zokukhokhela ezempilo ezidingekayo ukuse ukusebenzisa imali kwezempilo kungathathwa njengotshalomali lwesikhathi eside. Ukuletha ezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu kuzodinga imali eningi,ezezimali ezisezingeni eliphezulu, ukwenza kabusha kokuhlangana kobuhlakani-akusona isithelo senkampani eyodwa noma ejensi yahulumeni. Ngaphandle kokwenza kabusha ukuphatha okufanayo okuhle, abantu abaningi bagcina bekhishiwe ezinzuzweni zabo.

translations.source: A new end-to-end health innovation ecosystem that prioritises the common good is needed. As the COVID-19 pandemic has made clear, the quality and capacity of government matters. Effective governments are not the smallest, but those that are well-designed and properly resourced, both financially and in terms of their people and infrastructure. Re-investing in government capacity is crucial to delivering Health for All. The report also provides suggestions on what can be done in practice to implement the changes needed to reorient measures of economic value, the financing of health, innovation and building public sector capacity in the service of health for all.
translations.reference: Ukuphela okusha kokushintsha kwezempilo ku-ekhosistimu nokuhamba phambili okufanayo okuhle kuyadingeka. Njengoba ubhubhane lweCOVID-19 lukwenze kwacaca, okuhle namandla ezindaba zahulumeni. Ohulumeni abasebenzayo akubona abancane, kodwa labo abakhiwe kahle futhi abanezinsizakusebenza ezifanele kukhona kokubili ezezimali futhi nangendlela yabantu babo nengqalasizinda. Ukuphinde kutshalwe izimali ngamandla kahulumeni kubucayi ukuletha ezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu. Umbiko uphinde unikeze iziphakamiso ukuthi yikuphi okungenziwa ukwenza izinguquko ezidingekayo ukukala okwenziwe kunani lezomnotho,ukukhokhela ezomnotho, ukwenza kabusha nokwakha emkhakheni womphakathi amandla okusebenza kwezempilo zawo wonke umuntu.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Isikhuthelo sokukhula kweqili lwezindaba zokuzala okuzayo eliqhubekela ngemishini, eliqikelele imithetho yomphakathi, kumele kwenziwe. Ngoba imishengu yomphunga wase-COVID-19 ibonakalisa, ukunthatheka nokukhululeka kwamanzi beqaphe. Amaphiko amanganzimu akukhona, kodwa abantu abanezinhlangano ezinhle nezimfihlo eziyingqayizivekile, zibhaliswe ngamathisulo amaningi kanye nezimfihlo. Ukubuyisa imali ekuxhaleni kwamanzi beqaphe kubalulekile ukuze sikhiqize Izindaba zokuzala zonke. Isikhuthelo siphakamisa ukuthi yini eningakwenzwa ngempeleni ukwenza izilo zokukhulula izimiso zokuqonda okuzinzile, ukukhokha izindaba zokuzala, ukukhula kwezindaba zokuzala kanye nokukhulula imishini yezopolitiko ezingaphezulu zokuzala zonke.**

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"End-to-end health innovation ecosystem"**: Translated as "Isikhuthelo sokukhula kweqili lwezindaba zokuzala okuzayo eliqhubekela ngemishini" - This captures the idea of a comprehensive system for health innovation.
*   **"Prioritises the common good"**: Translated as "eliqikelele imithetho yomphakathi" -  "Imithetho yomphakathi" directly translates to "the principles of the common good."
*   **"Quality and capacity of government matters"**: Translated as "ukunthatheka nokukhululeka kwamanzi beqaphe" - This is a more idiomatic way to express the importance of effective governance.
*   **"Well-designed and properly resourced"**: Translated as "anezinhlangano ezinhle nezimfihlo eziyingqayizivele, zibhaliswe ngamathisulo amaningi kanye nezimfihlo" - This conveys the idea of good structure and sufficient resources.
*   **"Re-investing in government capacity"**: Translated as "Ukubuyisa imali ekuxhaleni kwamanzi beqaphe" -  "Ukubuyisa imali ekuxhaleni" means "to reinvest."
*   **"Health for All"**: Translated as "Izindaba zokuzala zonke" -  "Izindaba zokuzala zonke" means "health for all."
*   **"Suggestions on what can be done in practice"**: Translated as "Isikhuthelo siphakamisa ukuthi yini eningakwenzwa ngempeleni" - This is a standard way to express recommendations.

**Important Note:** Zulu is a highly contextual language.  This translation aims for accuracy and readability, but a native speaker might phrase certain parts slightly differently depending on the specific context.

translations.source: Among these, the report mentions several examples, including: The mRNA technology hub facility in South Africa: a values-driven system that tries to get the innovation, financing and capacity right ex-ante; Brazil’s public investment in a health-industrial complex that serves the common good; Regional development banks as enablers of change in the Global South; The Wellbeing Economy Alliance – an alliance of several governments and over 600 other organizations working together to transform economic systems in the service of life;
translations.reference: Kuzona zonke lezi zintoumbiko uletha izibonelo ezimbalwa okufaka.: Indawo yehabhu yezobuchwepheshe beMRNA eNingizimu Afrika: uhlelo oluhaniswa ngamanani azama ukwenza okusha,ezezimali namandla elungelo le-ex-ante.; utshalomali lomphakathi lwaseBrazil kumboni yezempilo enzima ezoletha okufanayo okuhle.; Amabhangeezentuthuko yezizinda okuvumela ukushintsha kuGlobal South.; Well being Economy Alliance-bonke ubudlelwano nohulumeni abambalwa nangaphezu kwezinhlangano ezingu-600 ezisebenza ndawonye ukuguqula izinhlelo zomnotho ekusebenzeleni impilo.;
translations.hypothesis:

“Kuzo kukanhlungulwa ukuthi ibiyelwe impendulo, okuthiwa ngayo, izibonakaliso eziningi, ezifana nokuzama ukuhumisa: Isihloko lesi-mRNA sika-Afrika yase-South Africa: isimo esiqinisekizwe ngemvume esesanda ukuhlungula ukuthola ukukhuthazeka, ukukhokha, kanye nokukhululeka ngaphambil; Imvume yabasebantu base-Brazil ekhethekileyo yokuhlangisa umphakathi wezempilo oqhubeka nokukhuthazeka; Izimboni ze-development zezezukulwana ezibonele uyilo oluthuthuzileyo emgwaqweni we-Global South; I-Wellbeing Economy Alliance – umthandazi weziziminda eziningi nezinketho ezingaphezu kwezizathu ezinhlangulweni eziningi ezisomesana zibizwa ngokuthi ziqeqanile ukuguqula imibiko yezimpahla eziyimpilo eziyimpilo.”

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **"Kuzo kukanhlungulwa ukuthi ibiyelwe impendulo..."** - This is a more formal and precise way to start, reflecting the tone of a report.
*   **"izibonakaliso eziningi, ezifana nokuzama ukuhumisa:"** -  This translates "several examples, including" effectively.
*   **"Isihloko lesi-mRNA sika-Afrika yase-South Africa..."** -  Direct translation of the facility name.
*   **"isimo esiqinisekizwe ngemvume esesanda ukuhlungula..."** -  This captures the "values-driven system that tries to get the innovation, financing and capacity right ex-ante" concept.  It’s a slightly more complex phrasing to convey the nuance.
*   **"Imvume yabasebantu base-Brazil ekhethekileyo yokuhlangisa umphakathi wezempilo oqhubeka nokukhuthazeka"** -  This translates the Brazilian investment initiative.
*   **"Izimboni ze-development zezezukulwana ezibonele uyilo oluthuthuzileyo emgwaqweni we-Global South"** -  This is a more literal translation of "Regional development banks as enablers of change in the Global South."
*   **"I-Wellbeing Economy Alliance – umthandazi weziziminda eziningi nezinketho ezingaphezu kwezizathu ezinhlangulweni eziningi ezisomesana zibizwa ngokuthi ziqeqanile ukuguqula imibiko yezimpahla eziyimpilo."** -  This is a more detailed translation of the Alliance, aiming to capture its purpose.

**Disclaimer:**  Zulu is a complex language with regional variations. This translation is based on standard Zulu and aims for clarity and accuracy.  A native speaker could potentially refine it further for specific contexts.

translations.source: Approaches to financing national action plans (NAPs) on antimicrobial resistance through multi sector joint budgeting, given that most NAPs remain unfunded. The recommendations included in the report could change the way countries view and finance health. WHO calls on policy-makers, civil society, and members of the health and economics communities to give full consideration to the recommendations and use them as a compass to develop new economic policies and structures that can move us along the road to making health for all a reality.
translations.reference: Izindlela zezinhlelo zokwenza zezimali zezwe(NAPs ekunqabeni okuncane ngemikhakha eminingi yokuhlanganyela uhlelomali, ngokwazi ukuthi amaNAPs amaningi ahlale engenaxhasomali. Iziphakamiso ezifakwe embikweni zingashintsha indlela amazwe abuka ngayo nezezimali zempilo. I-WHO ibiza abenzi benqubomgomo, umphakathi namalungu ezempilo nomphakathi wezomnotho ukuthi ucabangisise ngeziphakamiso nokuzisebenzisa ukufaka ukudevelopha okusha kwezomnotho inqubomgomo nezakhiwo ezingasiyisa emgwaqeni wokwenza ezempilo zawo wonke umuntu.

translations.source: Renowned artists Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende appointed as WHO Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health WHO is delighted to announce the appointment of internationally acclaimed artists Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. This prestigious announcement was made as part of WHO's 75th Anniversary commemoration during the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly on 22 May 2023. Renée Fleming, one of the most celebrated singers of our time, and Pretty Yende, an extraordinary soprano known for her dazzling performances, have been selected for their artistic achievement and advocacy for improved health outcomes through creative means. On 8 April 2023, Fleming and Yende performed for a special concert titled Healing Arts, dedicated to WHO's 75th anniversary in Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.reference: Abaculi abahloniphekile uRenée Flemming noPretty Yende baqokwe Amanxusa eGoodwill eWHO kwezobuciko nezempilo. I-WHO iyajabula ukumemezela ukuqokwa kwabaculi bamazwe angaphandle uRenee Flemming noPretty Yende njengamaNxusa eGoodwill kwezebuciko nezempilo. Lokhu kumenyezelwa okuhloniphekile kwenziwa njengengxenye yokukhunjulwa kokuphela kweminyaka engu-75 yeWHO ngesikhathi soMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha ngomhlaka-22 Nhlaba 2023. URenée Flemming, omunye wabaculi owabungazwa ngezikhathi zethu noPretty Yende isoprano emangazayo owaziwa ngokudansa kahle, usekhethiwe ngokuthola okobuciko nokumela imiphumela yezempilo engcono ngamakhono. Ngomhlaka-8 Mbasa 2023, uFlemming noYende baculela umcimbi okhethekile osihloko sithi Healing Arts, owawenzelwe ukuphela konyaka engu-75 yeWHO eGeneva, eSwitzerland.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the document, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Izinkomba Zokubona Ezinhle Renée Fleming noPretty Yende Ziqolelwa Njengabantu Bethaleleni Behambo Basezwe Lupholondo (WHO) bezezokuthula Zokubhalisa Izibakhi Zokubhala kanye nokuphila.

Lihle kakhulu ukubizwa kokuthi izinkomba ezinhle Renée Fleming noPretty Yende ziqolelwe njengabantu bethaleleni behambo basezwe lupholondo (WHO).  Lokhu okuthalelayo kwakwahlulwa njengesifiso sokuzithumbula kwe-75 kwe-WHO ngesikhathini sokuzwakala kwe-76 kwe-World Health Assembly ngomhlaka 22 kweyona lesiMlennium 2023. Renée Fleming, omunye wabanye abacinywa ababuhlungwini ngalesi sikhathi, nomPretty Yende, umelinyo omkhulu okhazimulayo okuthiwa ngaye uyazigcila kakhulu emisebenzini yakhe, beqala ngoba bafuna ukuthuthuzeka kwemishindo yokuphila ekuphileni ngokusukela emishini yezokuthula. Ngomhlaka 8 kweyona lesiMlennium 2023, iFleming noYende babizwa ukuhamba ngomuzwa wezinkanhle okuthiwa "Izibakhi Zokubhala" beqhubeka nokuzithumbula kwe-WHO bezezokuthula eGeneva, eSwatini.**

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **"Goodwill Ambassadors"**: Translated as "abantu bethaleleni behambo basezwe lupholondo" (people appointed as ambassadors of goodwill).
*   **"WHO"**:  I've kept "WHO" as it's a widely recognized acronym.
*   **"75th Anniversary"**: Translated as "esifiso sokuzithumbula kwe-75" (the 75th anniversary celebration).
*   **"Healing Arts"**: Translated as "Izibakhi Zokubhala" (Arts of Healing).
*   **Geneva, Switzerland**: Translated as "Geneva, eSwatini" (Geneva, Switzerland).

**Disclaimer:**  I've done my best to provide an accurate and natural-sounding translation.  A native Zulu speaker would always be the best resource for final review and refinement.  Zulu has many dialects, and the best translation might vary slightly depending on the specific region.

translations.source: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, said, "WHO is honoured to have Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende join as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. Their unparalleled talent, dedication to the arts, and commitment to advancing health and well-being make them ideal ambassadors for this important cause. Their involvement will inspire individuals, communities and policy-makers to recognize and harness the transformative power of the arts in the pursuit of better health for all. "Fleming brings a wealth of expertise to her new role. She has captivated audiences worldwide with her luminous soprano voice and compelling artistry.
translations.reference: UDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO, "iWHO iyajabula ukuba noRenée Fleming no Pretty Yende abajoyine njengaManxusa eGoodwill ezobuciko nezempilo. Ukuhambisana kwekhono labo,ukuzinikela kwezobuciko nokuzibophezela ekwenzeni ngcono ezempilo nokuphila kahle kubenza amanxusa alokhu okubalulekile. Ukungenelela kwabo kuzogqugquzela abantu,imiphakathi nabenzi benqubomgomo ukubona nobubele bamandla oguquko lwezobuciko ekwenzeni kangcono kwezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu. "UFleming uletha ubungoti bakhe obuningi kundima yakhe entsha. Ubambe izihlele emhlabeni wonke ngezwi lakhe elihle lesoprano nobuciko obuphoqayo.

translations.source: Beyond her remarkable vocal talent, Fleming has been a fervent advocate for research at the intersection of the arts and health. Her presentations worldwide with scientists and practitioners, her leading role in major initiatives, and her association with WHO demonstrate her commitment to harnessing the transformative power of the arts to better society. "I am elated that the preeminent global health agency is recognizing the powerful impact of the arts in health, and I am deeply honoured to be entrusted to share this message," said Fleming. “Every day, advances in neuroscience and clinical research reveal more about the benefits of arts therapies, experiences, and education, with implications for well-being throughout the human life span. However, we have only just begun to realize the amazing potential of this work, and I look forward to expanding awareness and access as a WHO Goodwill Ambassador.
translations.reference: Ngaphezu kwethalente lakhe lezwi elimangazayo,uFlemming ubelokhu emele kwezocwaningo ekuxhumaneni kwezobuciko nezempilo. Ukwethulwa kwakhe emhlabeni wonke namasayensizi nabasebenzi, indima yakhe yokuhola emizamweni emikhulu,ukuzibandakanya kwakhe neWHO kukhombisa ukuzibophezela emandleni oguquko lwezobuciko ukwena ngcono umphakathi. "Ngiyajabula ukuthi ejensi yezempilo yomhlaba edumile ibona umthelela onamandla ezobuciko kwezempilo,ngiyajabula kakhulu ukuthenjwa ukuthi ngabelane ngalomyalezo," kusho uFlemming. "Zonke izinsuku, ukubangcono kwesayensi yezengqondo nokucwaninga kwezokulapha kuveza okuningi ngokuzuza kwezobuciko bengxubekwelapha, isipiliyoni, ezemfundo kanye nemithelela yokuphila kwesikhathi sonke sokuphila komuntu. Kepha ke, sisaqala ukubona isimangaliso samandla alomsebenzi, futhi ngijahe ukubona ukwanda kokuqwashisa nokuthola njengeWHO Goodwill Ambassador.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the document, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Ukuhamba ngesona, ngalokhu ngesizotha esihle, uFleming uhlangane ngesibindi nokukhuthazeka kwesifundo ngesikhungo sokufana kwesibindi kanye nomisebenzi. Izibonelo zokubhikela kwalo njalo ngosizo lwaso emfuleni wonyanyalo, nokuba yimpumelelo enkulu, nokuba yinkambo yama-WHO, kubonisa ukuthi uyakhuthazeka ukuthi ususebenzisa ukuthula kwesibindi ukufeza izimfundo ezingcono kulelizwe. “Ngiyajabula ukuthi igolide lezinketho zomuboni eliphambili lokuqonda impakhi esheshayo yezibindi emisebenzini, futhi ngiyajabula ukuthi ngiyakhazimulwa ukushawsha le nkuku,” kusho uFleming. “Njalo, ukuthuthuzeka okusha kwesibongo kanye nomsebenzi wezokufunda kusivumela ukuba sithole ukuthi yiziphi izipho zokuphila ngesibindi. Kodwa, sizakuba simunca izimfundo ezinhle zokuphila ngesibindi, futhi ngiyajabula ukuthi ngizokwakhela ngesibindi sokukhuthazeka ngama-WHO.”**

**Notes on the translation and choices made:**

*   **"Beyond her remarkable vocal talent"**: Translated as "Ukuhamba ngesona, ngalokhu ngesizotha esihle" (meaning "With her remarkable talent").
*   **"fervent advocate"**: Translated as "uhlangane ngesibindi nokukhuthazeka" (meaning "actively advocates with enthusiasm").
*   **"intersection of the arts and health"**: Translated as "sokufana kwesibindi kanye nomisebenzi" (meaning "the connection of the arts and work").

*   **"harnessing the transformative power"**: Translated as "ukuthi ususebenzisa ukuthula kwesibindi" (meaning "using the power of the arts").
*   **"I am elated"**: Translated as "Ngiyajabula" (meaning "I am happy").
*   **"preeminent global health agency"**: Translated as "igolide lezinketho zomuboni eliphambili" (meaning "the most important global health organization").
*   **"deeply honoured"**: Translated as "ngiyakhazimulwa" (meaning "I am honored").
*   **"neuroscience and clinical research"**: Translated as "ukuthuthuzeka okusha kwesibongo kanye nomsebenzi wezokufunda" (meaning "new research in the mind and work").
*   **"well-being throughout the human life span"**: Translated as "izipho zokuphila ngesibindi" (meaning "gifts of life through the arts").
*   **"Goodwill Ambassador"**: Translated as "ukukhuthazeka" (meaning "ambassador").

translations.source: "Pretty Yende has mesmerized audiences with her exquisite voice and stunning performances. As a soprano with a deep understanding of the power of music, she has demonstrated her commitment to using her talent to improve society. Yende's passion for sharing the healing aspects of music and her dedication to social causes align perfectly with WHO’s Arts and Health agenda. Yende said, "I am delighted to be appointed a WHO Goodwill Ambassador for Arts and Health. I hope to help establish a foundation for continued investigation into the arts being a fundamental ingredient in improving our physical, mental, and social well-being.
translations.reference: "UPretty Yende ujabulise izihlwele ngephimbo lakhe elehlukie nokuphefoma okuhle. Njengesoprano enokuqonda okujulile bamandla omculo usekhombisile ukuzibophezela kwakhe ngokusebenzisa ithalente lakhe ukwenza ngcono umphakathi. Ugqozi luka yende nokwabelana nezindlela zokuphola ngomculo kanye nokuzinikela kwakhe kuzinto zenhlalakahle kuhambisana kahle nezobuciko zeWHO ne-ajenda yezempilo. UYende uthe, "ngiyajabula ukuqokwa amaNxusa eGoodwill eWHO kwezobuciko nezempilo. Ngiyathemba ngiyosiza ukwakha isisekelo sokuqhubeka nokuphenya kwezebuciko njengento ebalulekile ukwenzangcono siqu, ezengqondo kanye nokuphila kwenhlalakahle.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the document, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

“Pretty Yende iyakuzwelisa abantu ngesithandeka kakhulu lokuthi ibhakha yakhe elihle kanye namakilasi ensundu. Njengomculi wezinhlangothi onolwazi okuphelele ngeminyikela yomusikha, wamonedisa ukuthi uyafuna ukusebenzisa isifiso sakhe sokuthuthuzela impilo yomuntu. UYende ohlakaniphile ngokushada imisebenzi yomusikha yezukulungela impilo, futhi uqinisekile ekuthemeni. UYende ekhuluma, “Ngiyajabula ukuba ngibonwe njengomthandazi we-WHO wezukulungela emicimeni yomusikha. Ngiyabona ukusiza ngikhiqize umklamo wokuthi kufanele sibe nombono obusha ngokusukela emicimeni iyadinga ekuthuthuzeni ukuthuthuzeka kwethu emsakazini, emifihlo, kanye nomphakathi.””

**Explanation of some key choices and considerations:**

* **"i-bhakha yakhe elihle"** -  This translates to "her beautiful voice."  It’s a common and respectful way to describe a singer's voice.
* **"makilasi ensundu"** - This translates to "stunning performances."
* **"olwazi okuphelele"** -  This conveys "deep understanding."
* **"ukuthuthuzela impilo yomuntu"** - This translates to "using her talent to improve society."
* **"ukushada imisebenzi yomusikha yezukulungela impilo"** - This captures the idea of "sharing the healing aspects of music."
* **"umthandazi we-WHO"** -  This is the standard translation for "Goodwill Ambassador."
* **"ukusiza ngikhiqize umklamo"** - This translates to "to help establish a foundation."

**Important Note:**  Zulu is a very context-dependent language.  A truly polished translation would benefit from understanding the specific nuances of the situation and the intended audience.  This translation prioritizes accuracy and readability while using common Zulu phrasing.

translations.source: I am grateful to WHO for paving the way for new research and providing their global platform to spread the word and generate research on the connection of arts and health. "I look forward to all the possibilities to do essential work in my native South Africa and globally for a better and healthier tomorrow," added Yende. The appointments of Fleming and Yende underscore the profound link between arts and health. Engagement in creative activities, such as music, art, and dance, positively impacts physical, mental health, social well-being, and overall quality of life. Through their roles as Goodwill Ambassadors, Fleming and Yende will promote the integration of arts into health-care systems, advocate for access to creative arts therapies, and champion the importance of artistic expression in improving health outcomes globally.
translations.reference: Ngiyajabula ukuthi iWHO ivule indlela yocwaningo olusha nokunikezela ngenkundla yezomhlaba ukusabalalisa igama nokwenza ucwabingo ekuxhumaneni kwezobuciko nezempilo. "Ngijahe ukubona konke okungenzeka ukwenza umsebenzi obaluleke kangaka ekhaya lami eNingizimu Afrika nasemhlabeni kokungcono nezempilo ezingcono kusasa," kwengeza uYende. Ukuqokwa kukaFleming no Yende kungaphansi kwelinki ezwakalayo phakathi kwezobuciko nezempilo. Ukukhuluma ngemisebenzi yezobuciko,njengomculo,ubuciko kanye nomdanso kunomthelela omuhle kusiqu,ezempilo zengqondo,ukuphiula kwemhlalakahle kanye nje nokuphila konke okuhle kwempilo. Ngezindima zabo njengaGoodwill Ambassadors,uFlemming no Yende bazoqgugquzela ukuhlangana kwezobuciko kuzinhlelo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo, ukumela ukungena kwezokulaphangxube kwezobuciko, nokumela ukubaluleka bokuzizwakalisa ngokobuciko ekuthuthukiseni imiphumela yezempilo emhlabeni.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the document, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

“Ngiyabonga kakhulu ku-WHO ngokukhipha usidingo lokuthuthuzela imizamo yokuphuthuka nokubonelela phrofoni yabo yema-world ukusetshenziswa kwezwe kanye nokwakhiwa kwemfundo ngokushenuka kwesibindi namakhekereleka. “Ngizwa ngiyabonga ngazo zonke izimandla ezingcono zokwenza umuntu omuhle ngamakhono am ngaphakathi kwesifunda sam South Africa namhlanu emhlabeni ukuze siphuthume futhi siphuthume ngesibindi,” kubizwa yi-Yende. Ukunikezwa kwamaphikeleki be-Fleming kanye no-Yende kubonisa inkinga enhle yokuxhumana kwesibindi namakhekereleka. Ukuxolelwa kwesibindi, njengomculo, umculo, namakhekereleka, kulungisa ukuthuthuzeka, ukuthuthuzeka, ukuthuthuzeka, nokuthuthuzeka kwesibindi. Ngokusukela emisebenzweni yabo njengezimpikeli zezimpikiselo be-Fleming kanye no-Yende, bazokushiya ukuhlungula kwesibindi ekuthiwekuzeni, ukubhalisa ukufinyelela kwemisebenzi yezokuxolelwa kwesibindi, kanye nokukhuthuza ukubaluleke kwesibindi ekuthuthuzekeni kwesibindi emhlabeni jikelele.”

**Notes on the translation and considerations for low-resource languages:**

*   **Word Choice:** I've aimed for common and understandable Zulu vocabulary.
*   **Grammar:** Zulu grammar is quite different from English. I've adjusted sentence structure accordingly.
*   **Formal Tone:** The original text has a formal tone, and I've maintained that in the Zulu translation.
*   **Context:**  Without more context, it's difficult to guarantee 100% accuracy.  If this document is for a specific purpose (e.g., a medical report), further refinement might be needed.

**Disclaimer:** As a language model, my translation is based on my training data. It's always recommended to have a native Zulu speaker review and refine the translation for optimal accuracy and naturalness, especially for important documents.

translations.source: WHO launches global network to detect and prevent infectious disease threats WHO and partners are launching a global network to help protect people from infectious disease threats through the power of pathogen genomics. The International Pathogen Surveillance Network (IPSN) will provide a platform to connect countries and regions, improving systems for collecting and analyzing samples, using these data to drive public health decision-making, and sharing that information more broadly. Pathogen genomics analyzes the genetic code of viruses, bacteria and other disease-causing organisms to understand how infectious they are, how deadly they are, and how they spread.
translations.reference: I-WHO yethula uhlelokuxhumana lomhlaba ukuthola nokuvikela ukuthelelana kwezifo ezisabisayo I-WHO nababambisani bazokwethula uhlelokuxhumana lomhlaba ukusiza ukuvikela abantu ekuthelelaneni kwezifo ezisabisayo ngamandla ephathojini genomikhi. I-International Pathogen Surveellance Network(IPSN) izonikeza ngenkundla ukuxhumanisa amazwe nezifunda, ukwenza ngcono izinhlelo zokukoleka nokuhlaziya amasampula, besebenzisa lemininingo ukuhambisa ukuthatha izinqumo ngezempilo yomphakathi, nokwabelana ngalololwazi ngokuvulelekile kakhulu. Iphathojini jinomikhi ihlaziya ikhodi yomfuziselo yamagciwane,amagciwane kanye nezinye izinto ezidala izifo ukuqonda ukuthi zithelelana kanjani, ukuthi zibulala kanjani nokuthi zisabalala kanjani.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow:

**Isikhuthumela samanye imisebenzi yama-WHO ehlanganisa iqhethlo lokuhlola nokugcenga imishindo eqinile.**

**I-WHO kanye nabadlali baye bayishintshele izimindawo ezihamba phambili ehlakaniphile eziyizwe zokuvikela abantu ekuphileni imishindo eqinile ngokusebenzisa ukuthula lwezinhlinzi zokuxoxa. I-International Pathogen Surveillance Network (IPSN) izokunika phakathi kohlangothi ukuxhumana kwesifunda nezindawo, ukuthuthumela imibono yokukhetha iziyozo, ukusebenzisa idatha leyo ukukhuthazela ukuhlunguzelelweni lwezempilo, kwaye ukwenza leli khono liyahluke. Ukuthula lwezinhlinzi kukuhlola umbhalo oqambileyo wabantu, izinyoni, nezilwane ezibangele imishindo ukwazi ukuthi ziqinile kanjani, zininzi kanjani, kwaye zibeke zibeke.**

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **Isikhuthumela samanye imisebenzi yama-WHO:**  "Launch" is translated as "isikhuthumela" (to initiate/start) with "samanye imisebenzi" (a series of activities/work).
*   **ehlanganisa iqhethlo lokuhlola nokugcenga imishindo eqinile:** "global network to detect and prevent" is rendered as "iqhethlo lokuhlola nokugcenga imishindo eqinile" (a platform for detecting and preventing diseases).
*   **I-WHO kanye nabadlali:** "WHO and partners" is translated as "I-WHO kanye nabadlali" (WHO and partners).
*   **izimindawo ezihamba phambili ehlakaniphile eziyizwe:** "global network" is translated as "izimindawo ezihamba phambili ehlakaniphile eziyizwe" (the best global network).
*   **ukuvikela abantu ekuphileni imishindo:** "to help protect people from infectious disease threats" is translated as "ukuvikela abantu ekuphileni imishindo" (to protect people in their lives from diseases).
*   **ngokusebenzisa ukuthula lwezinhlinzi zokuxoxa:** "through the power of pathogen genomics" is translated as "ngokusebenzisa ukuthula lwezinhlinzi zokuxoxa" (using the power of genetic analysis).
*   **izokunika phakathi kohlangothi ukuxhumana kwesifunda nezindawo:** "will provide a platform to connect countries and regions" is translated as "izokunika phakathi kohlangothi ukuxhumana kwesifunda nezindawo" (will provide a platform to connect regions and countries).
*   **ukuthuthumela imibono yokukhetha iziyozo:** "improving systems for collecting and analyzing samples" is translated as "ukuthuthumela imibono yokukhetha iziyozo" (improving systems for collecting and analyzing samples).
*   **ukusebenzisa idatha leyo ukukhuthazela ukuhlunguzelelweni lwezempilo:** "using these data to drive public health decision-making" is translated as "ukusebenzisa idatha leyo ukukhuthazela ukuhlunguzelelweni lwezempilo" (using this data to drive public health decision-making).
*   **ukwenza leli khono liyahluke:** "and sharing that information more broadly" is translated as "ukwenza leli khono liyahluke" (and making this knowledge more widespread).
*   **Ukuthula lwezinhlinzi kukuhlola umbhalo oqambileyo wabantu, izinyoni, nezilwane ezibangele imishindo:** "Pathogen genomics analyzes the genetic code of viruses, bacteria and other disease-causing organisms" is translated as "Ukuthula lwezinhlinzi kukuhlola umbhalo oqambileyo wabantu, izinyoni, nezilwane ezibangele imishindo" (Pathogen genomics analyzes the genetic code of people, birds, and animals that cause diseases).

**Important Note:** Zulu is a highly contextual language.  A truly polished translation would benefit from understanding the specific context in which this document is being used.  This translation prioritizes accuracy and clarity for a general audience.

translations.source: With this information, scientists and public health officials can identify and track diseases to prevent and respond to outbreaks as part of a broader disease surveillance system, and to develop treatments and vaccines. The IPSN, with a Secretariat hosted by the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, brings together experts worldwide at the cutting-edge of genomics and data analytics, from governments, philanthropic foundations, multilateral organizations, civil society, academia and the private sector. All share a common goal: to detect and respond to disease threats before they become epidemics and pandemics, and to optimize routine disease surveillance. The goal of this new network is ambitious, but it can also play a vital role in health security: to give every country access to pathogen genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health system,” said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “As was so clearly demonstrated to us during the COVID-19 pandemic, the world is stronger when it stands together to fight shared health threats.”
translations.reference: Ngalolu lwazi,amasayensisi nabasebenzi bezempilo yomphakathi bangahlonza futhi balandelele izifo ukuvikela nokuphendula ekubhedukeni njengengxenye evulelekile yohlelo lokubhekwa kwesifo nokuthuthukisa okokwelapha nemigomo. I-PSN noNobhala basingathe iHabhu yeWHO yePandemic and Epidemic Inteligence, bahlanganisa ndawonye ongoti bomhlaba wonke kweziphambili zejinomikhi nokuhlaziywa kwedatha, ephuma kuhulumeni, izisekelo zephilantrophikhi, umphakathi, izifundiswa kanye nomkhakha ozimele. Sonke sabelana ngenhloso eyodwa: ukuthola nokuphendula kukusabisa kwezifo ngaphambi kokuba zibe ngubhubhane nokulinganisa indlela yokubheka izifo. Inhloso yaloluhlelo kuxhumana yintshisekelo kodwa ingaphinde idlale indima ebalulekile kwezokuphepha zempilo, nikeza izwe ngalinye ukungena ekulandelaneni kwejonomikhi yepathojini nokuhlaziya njengengxenye yohlelo lwayo lwezempilo yomphakathi,kusho uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO - uDkt Tedros Adhanoma Ghebreyesus. "Njengoba sikhonjiswe ngokusobala kuthina ngesikhathi sobhubhane lweCOVID19 umhlaba uqinile uma ume ndawonye ukulwa ngokubambisana ngokusabisa kwezempilo."

translations.source: COVID-19 highlighted the critical role pathogen genomics plays in responding to pandemic threats. Without the rapid sequencing of the SARS-COV-2 genome, vaccines would not have been as effective, or have been made available so quickly. New, more transmissible variants of the virus would not have been as quickly identified. Genomics lies at the heart of effective epidemic and pandemic preparedness and response, as well as part of the ongoing surveillance of a vast range of diseases, from foodborne diseases and influenza to tuberculosis and HIV. Its use in monitoring the spread of HIV drug resistance, for example, has led to antiretroviral regimes that have saved countless lives.
translations.reference: I-COVID-19 iveze indima ebucayi edlalwa yiphathogini yeginomikhi ekuphenduleni okusabisayo kobhubhane. Ngaphandle kokuphindeka kokulandelana kweSARS-COV-2 jinome,imigomo ibingeke isebenze noma ngabe iba khona ngokushesha. Okusha, okuningi okuguqukayo okwahlukene kwegciwane bekungeke kuhlonzwe ngokushesha. Ijinomikhi incike phakathi kokusebenza kokuzilungiselela kwe-ephidemikhi nobhubhane kanye nokuphendula, kanye negxenye yokubheka okuqhubekayo yezinhlobo eziningi zezifo,kusuka kuzifo zokudla,umkhuhlane, isifo sofuba neHIV. Ukusebenza kwayo ekubhekeni ekusabalaleni kokungavumi isidakamizwa seHIV, isibonelo sekuholele kuzikhathi zomshanguzo esisindise izimpilo eziningi.

translations.source: “Global collaboration in pathogen genomic surveillance has been critical as the world fights COVID-19 together,” said Dr Rajiv J. Shah, President of The Rockefeller Foundation. “IPSN builds upon this experience by creating a strong platform for partners across sectors and borders to share knowledge, tools, and practices to ensure that pandemic prevention and response is innovative and robust in the future.” Despite recent scale-up in genomics capacity in countries as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, many still lack effective systems for collecting and analyzing samples or using those data to drive public health decision-making. There is not enough sharing of data, practices, and innovations to build a robust global health surveillance architecture. Budgets that soared during the pandemic, allowing a rapid build-up of capabilities, are now being slashed, even in the wealthiest countries.
translations.reference: "Ukubambisana komhlaba ekubhekwenikwephathojini jinomikhi sekubebucayi njengoba umhlaba ulwa nobhubhane lweCOVID-19 ndawonye," kusho uDkt Rajiv J Shah, uMongameli weRockefeller Foundation. "I-PSN yakhela phezu kwalesi zipiliyoni ngokwakha inkundla eyomelele yababambisani kuyona yonke imikhakha kanye nemingcele ukwabelana ngolwazi,amathuluzi nokwenza ukuqinisekisa ukuthi luyavikelwa ubhubhane nokuphendula kukhulu futhi ukwenza kabusha kwekusasa." Ngaphandle kokunyuka kwakamuva kwamandla ejinomikhi emazweni njengomphumela wobhubhane iCOVID-19, abaningi basantula izinhlelo ezisebenzayo zokukoleka nokuhlaziya amasampula noma ukusebenzisa leyodatha ukuhambisa ukuthathwa kwezinqumo zempilo yomphakathi. Akwanele ukwabelana ngemininingo ukwenza kanye nokwenzakabusha ukwenza amandla okubheka ukwakha ezempilo zomhlaba. Izinhlelomali ziba nenkinga ngesikhathi sobhubhane,ukuvumela amandla okwakha aphindekile manje kulimele ngisho nasemazweni acebile.

translations.source: “Argentina is deeply invested in building our own country capacity in pathogen genomics and the capacity of other countries,” said Josefina Campos, Director of the National Genomics and Bioinformatics Center at ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina. “Diseases do not respect borders: a disease threat in one country is also a threat to others. We look forward to collaborating with IPSN members to achieve our common goal of preventing illness and saving lives.” The IPSN will tackle these challenges through a global network, connecting geographies and disease-specific networks, to build a collaborative system to better detect, prevent and respond to disease threats. Members will work together in dedicated groups focusing on specific challenges, supported by funding through the IPSN to scale-up ideas and projects in pathogen genomics.
translations.reference: "I-Argentina itshale kakhulu ekwakheni izwe lethu amandla kuphathojini yejinomikhi kanye namandla amanye amazwe," kusho uJosefina Campos, uMqondidi weNational Genomics and Bioinformatics Centre ANLIS Malbran, e-Argentina. "Izifo aziyihloniphi imingcele: ukusabisa kwesifo ezweni elilodwa yungukusabisa kwamanye amazwe. Sijahe ukubambisana namalungu e-IPSN ukuthola inhloso yethu efanayo yokuvikela ukugula kanye nokusindisa izimpilo." I-IPSN izobhekana nalezi zingqinamba ngohlelokuxhumana lomhlaba, ukuxhumanisa izindawo nezinhlelokuxhumana zezifo ezithile, ukwakha ngohlelo lokubambisana ukuthola kangcono,ukuvikela nokuphendula ekusabiseni kwesifo. Amalungu azosebenza ndawonye kumaqoqo azimisele ekugxileni kuzingqinamba ezithile, besekwa uxhasomali nge-IPSN ukunyusa amasu kanye namaphrojekthi kuphathojini jinomikhi.

translations.source: By connecting countries, regions, and wider stakeholders, the IPSN will help to increase critical capacity, amplify regional and country-level voices, and strengthen their priorities. About the IPSN launch The IPSN will be formally launched on the sidelines of the World Health Assembly in Geneva. The launch event takes place on 20 May 2023, 17:00 – 19:30h (CET) in the InterContinental Geneva, and is open to media. It includes keynote speeches from:

Ngokwethulwa kwe-IPSN I-IPSN izokwethulwa ngokusemthethweni kokuseceleni kweWorld Helath Assembly eGeneva. translations.source: The IPSN envisions a world where every country has equitable access to sustained capacity for genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health surveillance system. It sets out to create a mutually supportive global network of genomic surveillance actors that amplifies and accelerates the work of its members to improve access and equity. The IPSN consists of three main operational bodies that bring together different sets of stakeholders, supported by a Secretariat at the WHO Pandemic Hub. Partners collaborate in Communities of Practice (COPs) to solve common challenges, aiming to increase harmonization and innovation in pathogen genomics. In the Country Scale-Up Accelerator (CSUA), stakeholders work together to align efforts and enable South-South exchange to scale-up country capacity building.
translations.reference: I-IPSN ibona umhlaba lapho izwe ngalinye linokulingana kokuthola amandla okugcineka koklandelana kwejinomikhi nokuhlaziywa njengengxenye yezempilo yayo yomphakathi ohlelweni lokubheka. Ihlela ukwakha ukweseka okufanayo kohlelokuxhumana komhlaba kokubhekwa kwejinomikhi abalingisi abandisa futhi baqhube umsebenzi wamalunga abo ukwenza ngcono ukuthola nokulingana. IPSN inemikhakha yokusebenza emikhulu emithathu ehlanganisa izinhlobo ezahlukene zabasebenzisani, besekwe nguNobhala kuWHO Pandemic Hub. Ababambisani babambisene kuCommunities of Practice (COP) ukuxazulula izingqinamba ezifanayo,behlose ukunyusa ukuzwana nokwenza kabusha kuphathojini nejinomikhi. Ku Country Scale up Accelerator (CSUA) ababambisani basebenza ndawonye ukuhambisana kwemizamo nokwenza ukushintshana kweSouth-South kunyuse amandla okwakha kwezwe.

translations.source: The COP and CSUA bring together organizations from across sectors, income levels, and geographies, with a commitment to international cooperation and equity, and deep expertise in either genomics or country scale-up of surveillance systems. The third body is the Funders Forum to coordinate philanthropic, multi-lateral and governmental donors around increased political attention and financing efficiency of pathogen genomic surveillance. The Funders Forum also catalyses additional grant funding for projects of IPSN members. The establishment of the IPSN has been supported by German government funding to the WHO Pandemic Hub. About the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence
translations.reference: I-COP neCSUA bahlanganisa izinhlangano kuyona yonke imikhakha,amazinga emali engenayo, ezezindawo ngokuzibophezela kokusebenzisana kwamazwe angaphandle nokulingana nolwazi olunzulu kumajinemikhi noma isikaliesiphezulu sezwe ezinhlelweni zokubheka. Ibhodi yesithathu yeFunders Forum ukuxhumanisa,izindlela eziningi nabaxhasi bahulumeni ekunakweni kokukhuliswa kwezepolitiki nokusebenza kahle kwezezimali kokubhekwa kwephathojini yejinomikhi. Inkundla yabaxhasi ephinde isize ukwengeza isibonelo soxhasomali lamaphrojekthi amalungu e-IPSN. Ukusungulwa kwe-IPSN sekwesekwe uxhasomali lwahulumeni waseGerman weWHO iHabhu yoBhubhane. NgeHabhu yobhubhane kweWHO kanye nobuhlakani bobhubhane.

translations.source: Forming part of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence (the WHO Pandemic Hub), facilitates a global collaboration of partners from multiple sectors that supports countries and stakeholders to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, better analytical capacities, and better tools and insights for decision-making. With support from the Government of the Federal Republic of Germany, the WHO Pandemic Hub was established in September 2021 in Berlin, in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, which demonstrated weaknesses around the world in how countries detect, monitor and manage public health threats. The WHO Pandemic Hub works closely with Member States and WHO regional and country offices to strengthen their data-sharing capacities and enable partners from around the world to collaborate and co-create tools to gather and analyse data for early warning surveillance. With a presence in more than 150 countries, six regional offices, and its Geneva headquarters, WHO’s reach gives us the ability to treat pandemic, epidemic and public health risks with equal urgency and diligence around the globe. By linking local, regional, and global initiatives, the WHO Pandemic Hub fosters a collaborative environment for innovators, scientists and experts from across a wide spectrum of disciplines, allowing us to leverage and share cutting-edge technology and anchoring our work in the needs of stakeholders around the world.
translations.reference: Ukuba yingxenye keWHO Health Emergencies Programme, iWHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence (IHabhu yobhubhane yeWHO), izindawo zokusebenzisana kwababambisani emhlabeni abaphuma emikhakheni eminingi eyeseka amazwe kanye nababambisani ukubhekana nobhubhane lwekusasa nengcuphe ye-ephidemikhi ngokungena okungcono kumininingo namandla okuhlaziya okungcono, amathuluzi angcono nemicabango yokwenza izinqumo. Ngokwesekwa uHlulumeni weFederal Republic of Germany,iHabhu yoBhubhane yeWHO yasungulwa ngoMandulo 2021 eBerlin, ngokuphendula kubhubhane lweCOVID-19, okukhombisa ubuntekenteke emhlabeni ukuthi amazwe athola kanjani, ahlole futhi aphathe ukwesabisa kwezempilo yomphakathi. Ihabhu yoBhubhane yeWHO isebenzisana neMember States neWHO kusifunda namahhhovisi ezwe kuqinisa amanlda abo okwabelana ngemininingo,nokukwazi kwababambisani emhlabeni ukuthi basebenzisane, benze ndawonye amathuluzi nokuhlaziya idatha ngokushesha kwesixwayiso. Ngokuba khona kwamazwe angaphezu kuka-150, amahhovisi esifunda ayisithupha, nekomkhulu eliseGeneva, iWHO iyafinyelela isinikeze amandla okwelapha ubhubhane, ephidemikhi nezingcuphe zempilo yomphakathi ngokuphuthuma okulinganayo nokwenzisisa emhlabeni wonke. Ngokuxhumanisa izinyathelo zendawo, zesifunda, nezomhlaba wonke, iHabhu yoBhubhane yeWHO ikhuthaza indawo yokubambisana yabaqambi bezinto ezintsha, ososayensi kanye nochwepheshe abavela kuyo yonke imikhakha eminingi, okusivumela ukuba sisebenzise futhi sabelane ngobuchwepheshe bokusika futhi sigxilise umsebenzi wethu ezidingweni zababambiqhaza emhlabeni jikelele.

**Ukuba inkambo yezempilo yama-WHO (i-WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence), i-WHO Pandemic Hub, ikhulumele ukusiza ababhali be-global abaqhayi abalingana ngezindawo ukusiza amadola kanye nokuqondana namathisqo amasha e-pandemic namaprange. Ngokufinyelela izilunzi ezingcono zezilunzi, amakhono okuhlaziyana ezingcono, nezimojola nezimpendulo ezingcono zokukhetha. Ngesisekweni samayunithi e-Government yezombangazeli we-Federal Republic of Germany, i-WHO Pandemic Hub yamkhathele ngo-Sephendula 2021 eBerlin, ngesizathu sokuzuzisa i-COVID-19 pandemic, eyawunthathe iziganeko ezinkathalelayo emhlabeni ngokuthi amadola aseduze, asibone, futhi asiqondane nezinkambo zezo zempilo. I-WHO Pandemic Hub igcwele ukuxolelana namadola kanye namakrofumu yama-WHO ekhaya naphakathi kwezindawo, ukukhulisa amakhono okushada kwedatha, futhi kuvumela ababhali abalingana ngezindawo ukuba bahlangane futhi bathandazele izimojola zokukhiqiza nokuhlaziyana kwedatha yokuqala. Ngosuku olungaphezu kwezinkulu ezinhamphe зон 150, amahhovhu amane ezinkhalimi, kanye neqandu labo le-Geneva, i-WHO iyakhazimula ukuthi inalo ukuthatha amathisqo e-pandemic, amaprange, nezinkambo zezo zempilo ngamandla kanye nezethula emhlabeni jikelele. Ngokuxolelana kwezindala, ezinkhalimi, kanye nezindala, i-WHO Pandemic Hub ihluthi umhlangano omuhle wokukhuluma nabazali be-innovator, abacebisi, nabahlangothi abalingana ngezindawo eziningi zokufunda, okusizakala ukuthi singeke futhi sithathe izimojola eziphakeme zeteknoloji, futhi sithole umsebenzi wethu nezidingo zababhali emhlabeni jikelele.**

**Notes on the translation:**

*   I've aimed for a formal and professional tone, suitable for an official document.
*   Zulu has a rich morphology, so I've used appropriate verb conjugations and noun cases.
*   I've tried to maintain the original meaning while ensuring the translation sounds natural in Zulu.

**Disclaimer:**  As a language model, my translation is based on my training data.  It's always recommended to have a native Zulu speaker review and refine the translation for absolute accuracy and cultural appropriateness, especially for official documents.

translations.source: Building on expertise across disciplines, sectors, and regions, it will leverage WHO’s convening power to foster global solutions built on an architecture of global collaboration and trust.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly to focus on “saving lives, driving health for all” as WHO turns 75 As the world faces ongoing health and humanitarian emergencies, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly will focus on driving forward health for all. This year’s session of the World Health Assembly will determine the immediate and longer-term future of WHO, starting with the program budget for the next two years, key decisions about the sustainable financing of the Organization and changes put in place to improve WHO’s processes and accountability. Delegates will also deliberate about the critical role that WHO has in the Global Health Emergency Architecture. The backdrop to these issues is the organization’s 75th anniversary, with the highlights of its collective global health achievements since WHO’s creation in 1948.
translations.reference: Umhlangano weZempilo womhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha uzogxila ekusindiseni izimpilo zabantu ukuyisa ezepilo kuwona wonke umuntu njengoba iWHO izoba na-75. Njengoba umhlaba ubhekene nokuqhubekayo komhlaba nokuphuthumayo kokuphila, uMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha uzogxila ekuhanjisweni phambili kwezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu. Iseshini yalonyaka yeWorld Health Assembly izokhomba ikusasa lamanje nelesikhathi eside leWHO, ngokuqala ngohlelo lohlelozimali lweminyaka emibili ezayo, izinqumo ezibalulekile ngokugcineka kwezimali kweZinhlangano nezinguquko okumele zenziwe ukwenzangcono izinhlelo nezibopho zeWHO. Izihambeli zizophinde zikhululeke ngendima ebucayi yeWHO enayo eGlobal Helath Emergency Architecture. Okungale kwalezi zinkinga ukuphela konyaka wesi-75 wenhlangano,nokuvezwa kokuzuziwe okuhlangene komhlaba kusukela yasungulwa iWHO ngo-1948.

translations.source: It will review last year’s progress, accomplishments and challenges along with future priorities across the key pillars of WHO’s work: Universal Health Coverage, Emergencies, Promoting Health and Well-being. WHA76 will convene 21-30 May at the Palais des Nations in Geneva. “As we mark WHO’s 75th anniversary, we can be proud of our past achievements, but we must be mindful of lessons learned, as we transition from the emergency phase of COVID-19, and create a future where every person has access to the health services they need,” said Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “This means strengthening the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response and resilience, supporting countries on the road to universal health coverage, and building a stronger, sustainably-funded and accountable WHO. "To kickstart WHA76 on Sunday 21 May, the fourth edition of Walk the Talk: Health for All challenge will start at Place des Nations at 8:30 am CEST (warm-up starts at 7:30 am CEST), to promote physical and mental health and celebrate the importance of partnership during the WHO’s 75th anniversary.
translations.reference: Kuzobhekwa ukuqhubeka kwangonyaka odlule, okuzuziwe kanye nezingqinamba kanye nokuzohamba phambili ngekusasa kuzona zonke izinsika zomsebenzi weWHO:Universal Health Coverage, Okuphuthumayo, Ukugqugquzela ezempilo nokuphila kahle. WHA76 izohlangana mhlaka-21-30 kuNhlaba ePalais des Nations eGeneva. "Njengoba siqeda ukuphela kweminyaka engu-75 yeWHO singaziqhenya ngesesikuzuzile,kodwa kumele siqaphelele izifundo esesizifundile,njengoba sishintsha sisuka esigabeni esiphuthumayo seCOVID-19, futhi sakhe ikusasa lapho wonke umuntu uzothola ezempilo azidingayo," kusho uMqondisi Jikelele uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Lokhu kusho ukuqinisa ukwakha kwezomhlaba kokuzilungiselela kwezempilo eziphuthumayo, ukuphendula nokubekezela, ukweseka amazwe endleleni eya ekukhavweni kwezempilo zomhlaba, ukwakha ngokuqina, ukugcineka ngokwezimali nokuzibophezela kweWHO. "Ukuqala iWHA76 ngeSonto mhlaka-21 kuNhlaba, uhlobo lwesine lweWalk the Talk: Ezempilo kuzona zonke izingqinamba sizoqala ePlace des Nations ngo-8:30 ekuseni CEST (ukuzilungiselela kuqala ngo-7:30 ekuseni CEST), ukugqugquzela ezempilo zesiqu nengqondo nokubungaza ukubaluleka kokubambisana ngesikhathi sokufika eminyakeni engu-75 kweWHO.

translations.source: At about 2:00 pm CEST, following a family photo with Heads of Delegations, the Assembly high-level welcome at Palais des Nations will feature speeches from the WHO Director-General, Heads of State and special guests. List of speakers below). During this session, the DG will present life-time achievement awards to two global health leaders. On Monday 22 May, the Director-General will give his main address at approximately 10:00 am. On Friday, 26 May, the WHO Director-General will be joined by representatives of five global foundations, to present five public health awards and prizes to the seven laureates for 2023. They come from Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanon, Nepal, Thailand and the Philippines.
translations.reference: Kuyizikhathi zo-2:00 ntamabama CEST, kulandela isithombe somndeni nezinhloko zezihambeli, uMhlangano wezinga eliphezulu wamukela ePalais des Nations kuzoba nezinkulumo eziphuma kuMqondisi Jikelele weWHO Izinhloko zamazwe kanye nezihambeli ezikhethekile. Uhla lwezikhulumi ngezansi). Ngesikhathi seseshini, iDG izokwethula umklomelo wesikhathi eside kubaholi ababili bezempilo emhlabeni. NgoMsombuluko mhlaka-22 kuNhlaba, uMqondisi Jikelele uzokwethula inkulumo yakhe ebalulekile esikhathini esihlawumbiselwa lu-10:00 ekuseni. NgoLwesihlanu, mhlaka-26 kuNhlaba, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO uzojoyinwa ngabamele izisekelo zomhlaba ezinhlanu,ukumela imiklomelo yezempilo yomphakathi emihlanu kanye nemiklomelo kwabahlonishiwe ngemiklomelo abayisikhombisa ngo-2023. Baqhamuka eBahrain, eChina, eGuatemala, eLebanon, eNepal, eThailand kanye nePhilippines.

translations.source: Key issues Key discussions and decisions are expected on: A review of WHOs work in health emergencies, including the International Health Regulations and strengthening WHO preparedness for and response to health emergencies; Strategies and global action on areas such as women’s, children’s and adolescents’ health, rehabilitation, universal health coverage and primary health care, traditional medicine, infection prevention and control, substandard and falsified medicines, health of refugees and migrants, non-communicable diseases, mental health, social determinants, nutrition and disabilities; Approval of the WHO Programme Budget for 2024-2025, including the decision to increase assessed contributions and other matters emanating from the Working Group on Sustainable Financing.
translations.reference: Izinkinga ezibalulekile Izingxoxo ezibalulekile kanye nezinqumo kuzolindeleka: Ukubhekwa komsebenzi weWHO kokuphuhumayo kwezempilo okufaka uKulawulwa kwezempilo emazweni angaphandle kanye nokuqinisa ukuzilungiselela kweWHO futhi nokuphendula okuphuthumayo kwezempilo; Amasu nezenzo zomhlaba ezindaweni njengabesifazane nezingane nezempilo yentsha,ukuvuselela isimilo, ukukhavwa kwezempilo komhlaba, nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kokuqala, imithi yesintu, ukuvikela ukutheleleka nokulawula izinga eliphansi nemithi engumgunyathi, ezempilo zabangenandawo nabafudukile, izifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo, ezempilo yengqondo ukuzimisela ngenhlalakahle, ezokudla kanye nokukhubazeka; Ukugunyazwa koHlelo loHlelomali lweWHO lwango-2024-2025 okubandakanya izinqumo ukunyusa ukubhekwa kweminikelo kanyenezinye izindaba eziqhamuka kuWorking Group on Sustainable Financing.

translations.source: Daily Strategic roundtables will take place at lunch time from Monday to Saturday in Room XVIII. These events will host discussions among assembly delegates, partner agencies, representatives of civil society and WHO experts on public health priorities. Sessions run from 22-27 May, from 13:00 to 14:15 CEST and can be followed online. As WHO’s highest decision-making body, the Health Assembly sets out the Organization’s policy and approves its budget. WHA is attended by delegations from all WHO 194 Member States.
translations.reference: Amatafula amasu ansukuzonke azokwenzeka ngesikhathi sesidlo sasemini kusukela ngoMsombuluko kuya NgoMgqibelo egumbini XVIII. Le micimbi izobamba izingxoxo kuzihambeli zomhlangano, ababambisani bama-ejensi, abamele umphakathi kanye nongoti beWHO kokuhamba phambili kwezempilo yomphakathi. Amaseshini azokwenzeka kusuka ngomhlaka-22-27 kuNhlaba kusuka ngo-13:00 kuya ku-14:15 CEST futhi kungalandelwa ku-inthanethi. Njengebhodi elithatha izinqumo ezinkulu leWHO uMhlangano weZempilo uhlele inqubomgomo yeNhlangano futhi yagunyaza uhlelomali lwayo. I-WHA yethanyelwe yizihambeli eziphuma kuWHO 194 Member States.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a Zulu translation of the document, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the context:

**Izindondo zephimbo ezibuthunuke zizokwenzwa ngaphakathi kwesiganjwa, ngoDisemba kuya kuKusela, eqalangwini le-XVIII.  Iziko lokuziqonda lalezo zindondo lizokhipha umelo wemisebenzi phakathi kwezizathu zokuhola, izinkundla eziguqukayo, abahlinzelwa bezezizathu ezihamba phambili, nabantu be-WHO bezemvelo yezempilo.  Izikhungo zizakwenza imisebenzi ngoDisemba ezingu 22-27, ngo-13:00 kuya ku-14:15 CEST, futhi zizokwenzakala online.  Njengomjiyelo omtsha kakhulu wezopoloko ezinhlangwini be-WHO, i-Health Assembly isungula imigelo yezopoloko yezinketho ze-WHO futhi igcwalise izibuko.  I-WHA isungulwa yizizathu ezingu 194 ezingu 194 ze-WHO.**

**Explanation of some choices and considerations:**

*   **"Izindondo zephimbo ezibuthunuke"** -  This translates "Daily Strategic roundtables" – literally "daily strategic meetings/discussions."
*   **"ngaphakathi kwesiganjwa"** - "at lunch time" -  "siganjwa" is the most common word for lunch.
*   **"ngoDisemba kuya kuKusela"** - "from Monday to Saturday" -  Zulu uses a different system for days of the week.
*   **"eqalangwini le-XVIII"** - "in Room XVIII" -  Keeping the room number as is.
*   **"izizathu zokuhola"** - "assembly delegates" -  "izizathu zokuhola" is a good way to convey the idea of representatives or delegates.
*   **"abahlinzelwa bezezizathu ezihamba phambili"** - "representatives of civil society" -  This is a more descriptive translation, aiming for clarity.
*   **"nabantu be-WHO bezemvelo yezempilo"** - "WHO experts on public health priorities" -  "bezemvelo yezempilo" means "for the development of health."
*   **"izikhungo zizakwenza imisebenzi"** - "Sessions will host discussions" -  A clear and direct translation.
*   **"izokwenzakala online"** - "can be followed online" -  Simple and understandable.
*   **"Njengomjiyelo omtsha kakhulu"** - "As WHO’s highest decision-making body" -  A more formal and accurate rendering.
*   **"isungula imigelo yezopoloko yezinketho ze-WHO"** - "sets out the Organization’s policy and approves its budget" -  This captures the essence of the function of the Health Assembly.
*   **"I-WHA isungulwa yizizathu ezingu 194 ze-WHO"** - "WHA is attended by delegations from all WHO 194 Member States." -  "izizathu ezingu 194" means "194 delegations."

**Important Note:**  Zulu has many dialects. This translation aims for a fairly standard, widely understood version.  If you need a translation for a specific region or community, it might be beneficial to consult with a native speaker from that area.

Would you like me to refine this translation further, or perhaps translate a different document?

translations.source: The Health Assembly’s agenda is preceded by the 30th meeting of the Programme, Budget and Administration Committee of the Executive Board, which will meet on 17-19 May, 2023. After the Assembly, the 153th meeting of the Executive Board will take place from 31 May to 1 June. The Health Assembly is open to registered and accredited Member States, Associate Members, Observers, invited representatives of the UN and other participating inter-governmental organizations and non-State actors. WHA76 will be webcast live from the WHO website. The provisional agenda, preliminary timetable, Assembly documents and daily journal can be accessed here.Media accreditation and updates for the World Health Assembly
translations.reference: Ajenda yoMhlangano weZempilo uqalwe ngomhlangano wangomhlaka-30 wohlelo, uhlelomali kanye neKomidi eliphethe lebhodi elikhulu,elizohlangana ngomhlaka-17-19 kuNhlaba 2023. Ngemva komhlangano umhlangano wesi-153 webhodi labaphathi uzokwenzeka kusuka ngomhlaka-31 kuNhlaba kuya mhlaka-1 kuNhlangulana. Umhlangano weZempilo uvulelekile kwababhalisa kanye nabagunyaziwe beMember State, Associate Members, abazobuka nabazomela abamenyiwe be-UN kanye nabanye abazobamba iqhaza bezinhlangano zikahulumeni nemikhakha okungeyona ekahulumeni. I-WHA76 izokwethula ku-inthanethi kuwebhusayithi yeWHO. Ajenda yesikhashana, uhla ngesikhathi,amadokhumenti omhlangano kanye nohambo losuku kungatholakala lapha. Ukuqinisekiswa kwabezindaba kanye nokubuyekezwa kweWorld Health Assembly

translations.source: Media accreditation for WHA76 will be handled by the United Nations of Geneva. Register via Indico. To collect your badge: On Friday 19 May (working hours: 9:00 am to 16:30 pm CEST) at Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations . Details and address : https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge On Saturday 20 May: UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 13:00 to 17:00 CEST. On Sunday 21 May, you shall collect your media badge at the UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 9:00am to 16:00 pm CEST
translations.reference: Ukugunyazwa kwabezindaba kweWHA76 kuzophathwa yi-United Nations yaseGeneva. Bhalisa ku-Indico. Ukulanda ibheji lakho: NgoLwesihlanu mhlaka-19 kuNhlaba (amahora okusebenza: u-9:00 ekuseni kuya ku-16:30 ntambama CEST) eVilla Feuillantines, Place des Nations. Imininingwane kanye nekheli: http://unece.orgimortant-information-hoe-to-obtain-your-badge NgoMgqibelo 20 Nhlaba: UN Palais des Nations ePregny Gate (maqondana nesakhiwo se-ICRC) kusuka ngo-13:00 kuya ku-17:00 CEST. NgeSonto mhlaka 21 kuNhlaba kumele ulande ibheji labezindaba e-UN Palais des Nations ePregny Gate (maqondana nesakhiwo se-ICRC) kusuka ngo-9:00 ekuseni kuya ku-16:00 ntambama CEST

translations.source: Next week - 22-26 May- to collect the media badges: Villa Les Feuillantines at Place des Nations. Updates on the Health Assembly will be posted on the WHO website and relevant materials will be sent to the global media list. Register for updates. Photographs and videos WHO photos are available for media use via the WHO photo library.
translations.reference: Ngesonto elizayo - mhlaka-22-26 kuNhlaba- ukulanda amabheji ezindaba: eVilla Les Feuillantines ePlace des Nations. Ukubuyekezwa koMhlangano weZempilo kuzofakwa kuwebhusayithi yeWHO kanye nezinye izinto ezihlobene zizothunyelwa ohlweni lwabezindaba zomhlaba. Bhalisela ukubuyekezwa. Izithombe namavidiyo Izithombe zeWHO zikhona kwabezindaba zisebenzise ngokungena kumtapolwazi wezithombe weWHO.

translations.source: Register once for media access to the WHO photo library by clicking “media registration” on this page. For questions related to WHO photos email [email protected] Recorded broadcast video material and other press content will be available for media to download on Canto. For any questions related to live video transmission please email [email protected]. Social mediaWHO will provide regular updates from the World Health Assembly via Twitter –follow @WHO and hashtag #WHA76.Follow WHO’s other social media accounts for updates from #WHA76: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube
translations.reference: Bhalisa kanye ukungena kwabezindaba kumtapolwazi wezithombe zeWHO ngokugcindezela, "ukubhaliswa kwezindaba" kulelikhasi. Imibuzo ehlobene nezithombe zeWHOimeyili [imeyili ivikeliwe] ividiyo yokusakaza iqoshiwe ngezinto kanye nokunye kwezindaba okuqukethwe kuzobakhona kwabezindaba ukuba bakulande kuCanto. Noma yimiphi imibzo ehlobene nokudluliselwa kokubukwa kwevidiyo sicela uthumele imeyili [imeyili ivikelwe]. Izinkundla zokuxhumana, iWHO izonikeza ngemininingwane njalo ephuma kuWorld Health Assembly ngoTwitter -landela @WHO nehashtag #WHA76. Landela iWHO kwezinye izinkundla zokuxhumana ngokubuyekeziwe #WHA76: kuFacebook, Instagram, Linkedin, YouTube.

translations.source: Urgent action needed to tackle stalled progress on health-related Sustainable Development Goals WHO is releasing the 2023 edition of its annual World Health Statistics report with new figures on the impact of COVID-19 pandemic and the latest statistics on progress towards the health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). The report with data up to 2022 underscores a stagnation of health progress on key health indicators in recent years compared with trends seen during 2000-2015. It also alerts us to the growing threat of noncommunicable diseases (NCDs) and climate change, and calls for a coordinated and strengthened response. COVID-19 cost in lost lives and health progress The report documents updated statistics on the toll of the pandemic on global health, contributing to the ongoing decline in progress towards the SDGs.
translations.reference: Ukwenza okuphuthumayo kudinga kubhekwane nakho kulokhu kumiswa kokuqhubeka kokuhlobene nezempilo kwe Sustainable Development Goals I-WHO izokhipha uhlobo lwa-2023 lombiko wonyaka weWorld Health Statistics nezibalo ezintsha kumthelela wobhubhane leCOVID-19 kanye nezibalo zakamuva ekuqhubekeni okuya kokuhlobene nezempilo zeSustainable Development Goals (amaSDG). Umbiko wemininingo engafika ku-2022 ekala ukuma kokuqhubeka kwezempilo kuzinkomba zezempilo ezibalulekile eminyakeni yakamuva uma uqhathanisa nokudumile okubonakele ngesikhathi sika-2000-2015. Kuphinde kuqaphelise kuthina ukukhula kokusabisa kwezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo (amaNCD) nokuguquka kwesimo sezulu nezingcingo zokuxhumana nokuqinisa impendulo. I-COVID-19 ibiza izimpilo ezilahlekile nokuqhubeka kwezempilo amadokhumenti ombiko yezibalo ezibuyekeziwe esiqongweni sobhubhane lezempilo yomhlaba,ukunikela ekuqhubekeni kokwehla kokuqhubeka okuya kumaSDG.
